name: agentic-character-sheets
description: Real AI agents statted as D&D 5e characters. Named slots, exposed mechanics, an evolution log. A sheet that omits a required slot fails CI — that is the point.

scripts.lint: for f in site/assets/*.js scripts/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.typecheck: for f in site/assets/*.js scripts/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
